course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #10 - Happy Ghast
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 13. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #10 - Happy Ghast

周围放上花。还有一些红色的花。好了。现在我们需要等待。我们需要等待。在等待 Ghast 长大的时候，让我们去拿一些雪球。我们需要一些——我们有雪球吗？我不觉得我们有雪球。嗯。好吧，让我们拿一些铁。让我们做一把铁铲。铁铲。好了。让我们拿上烤猪排。我们有一大堆烤猪排。我们现在有 32 question.prompt: What did the player need to do to grow the dried ghast into a happy ghast?

options: Place it in water and surround it with flowers
Feed it snowballs and golden apples
Put it next to a furnace to warm it up
Plant bamboo around it and wait
